untranslatable_reason: Signal requires (1) filtering by market-cap classification (small-cap), (2) ranking securities by prior-year returns and selecting worst performers, (3) fixed calendar dates for entry/exit which are not specified in the source text ('specific date not stated in excerpt'). The allowed indicators cannot express: security classification/filtering, cross-sectional ranking/selection, or undefined calendar dates. Calendar-based entry/exit would require parameterized dates not provided by the author.
translation_notes: This is a calendar-seasonality strategy combined with relative-performance selection. It requires: (a) small-cap universe filtering (not available in price/technical indicators), (b) prior-year returns ranking across a universe (cross-sectional comparison), and (c) specific entry/exit calendar dates (AUTHOR_SILENT). The 'worst returns in prior year' condition cannot be expressed with point-in-time indicators alone—it requires historical ranking logic. A complete implementation would need a custom portfolio construction rule, not a single-security technical condition.
